data.title: USA Compression Partners declares $0.525 per common unit distribution for Q2 2025; Earnings release on August 6.
data.description: USA Compression Partners, LP revealed a cash distribution of $0.525 per common unit ($2.10 annually) for Q2 2025. This distribution is scheduled for payment on August 8, 2025, to unitholders recorded by the end of business on July 28, 2025. For its second quarter, USA Compression will announce financial results before the opening of U.S. financial markets.

data.title: CMB.TECH announces progress on stock-for-stock merger with Golden Ocean Group Limited.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, CMB.TECH NV (traded as CMBT on NYSE and Euronext Brussels) shared an update on the stock-for-stock merger with Golden Ocean Group Limited (traded as GOGL on NASDAQ and Euronext Oslo Børs). This merger aims to combine the two companies' strengths and assets.

data.title: Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (CHP.UN) reports financial results for the six months ended June 30, 2025. Visit www.choicereit.ca for the report.
data.description: In Toronto, Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: CHP.UN) disclosed its financial results for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025. The 2025 Second Quarter Report can be accessed on the Investors section of the company's website, www.choicereit.ca, and has been submitted on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca. The Trust reported a robust quarter, showcasing the durability of its portfolio.

data.title: Albany International to release Q2 results on July 30, 2025, with webcast on July 31 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Listen at investors.albint.com.
data.description: Albany International Corp. (NYSE: AIN) is set to announce its second-quarter 2025 results on July 30, 2025, post-market closure. Following this, a webcast discussing the outcomes is scheduled for July 31, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Stakeholders can tune in to the live webcast through the Company’s Investor Relations website at investors.albint.com. To join the call, interested individuals should register via the provided web link.

data.title: Dopamine functions with surgical precision, not as a broad signal, as per study from University of Colorado.
data.description: A recent study from the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus challenges traditional neuroscience beliefs by uncovering a new perspective on the actions of dopamine, a key neurotransmitter in the brain. This discovery, made in July 2025, has the potential to revolutionize the treatment of brain disorders. The findings suggest that dopamine may have a more complex role than previously thought, opening doors to novel therapeutic approaches. This research sheds light on how neurotransmitters function and could impact millions of individuals affected by neurological conditions. This breakthrough represents a significant advancement in neuroscience, with far-reaching implications for the treatment of brain disorders worldwide.

GOLDMAN SACHS LAUNCHES INTERN-TO-BUY-SIDE TRACK TO STOP TOP TALENT FROM JUMPING TO PRIVATE EQUITY FIRMS.  INTERNS GET A FULL-TIME BANKING ROLE WITH A CLEAR PATH TO ASSET MANAGEMENT AFTER TWO YEARS, AIMING TO BOOST LONG-TERM RETENTION.

data.title: Canaan Inc. to produce A15Pro miners for Cipher Mining, bolstering hashrate with orders from US and Malaysian facilities.
data.description: Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN), a leader in crypto mining, has revealed plans to fulfill orders through its U.S. and Malaysian facilities. This move is anticipated to significantly boost the hashrate at Cipher's Black Pearl facility in Singapore. The company's announcement on July 17, 2025, highlighted the strategic decision to leverage resources from its subsidiaries to enhance operational capacity. This development is expected to drive growth in the company's mining capabilities and further solidify its position in the cryptocurrency market.
Total money market fund assets fell $7.26 bln to $7.07 trln for the week ended July 16th - ICI.

data.title: Deluxe to report Q2 2025 results on August 6, 2025. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. Call in at 1.888.394.8218 (ID 5158683).
data.description: In Minneapolis, Deluxe (NYSE: DLX), a renowned Payments and Data firm, is set to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, August 6, 2025, post market-close. Additionally, they will conduct an accessible conference call on the same day at 5:00 p.m. ET (4:00 p.m. CT). Interested parties can join the call by dialing 1.888.394.8218 with the conference ID 5158683. The event will also be streamed via a live webcast on the investor relations website.

data.title: MarketAxess to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 6, 2025. CEO and CFO will host conference call. $MKTX
data.description: In New York, MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: MKTX), a prominent electronic trading platform for fixed-income securities, is set to release its second quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, August 6, 2025, prior to the market opening. The company's CEO, Chris Concannon, and CFO, Ilene Fiszel Bieler, will conduct a conference call on the same day to offer insights into the financial outcomes and future prospects of the company. This announcement is a prominent event in the financial sector and is anticipated to provide crucial information for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: GitLab announces public beta of GitLab Duo Agent Platform for DevSecOps with AI, aiding collaboration.
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. has introduced the GitLab Duo Agent Platform in a public beta launch. This platform aims to enhance DevSecOps practices by enabling asynchronous collaboration between developers and AI agents. The platform serves as an intelligent orchestration layer to foster smoother collaboration among specialized AI technologies. This advancement signifies a key development in software engineering and underscores GitLab's commitment to streamlining developer workflows.

data.title: DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 6, 2025. Conference call at 5pm Eastern time.
data.description: In Centennial, Colorado, DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025, on August 6, 2025. Following the market's closing hours that day, a press release will be made public. President and Chief Executive Officer Art Zeile, alongside Chief Financial Officer Greg Schippers, will conduct a conference call and webcast at 5:00pm Eastern time to delve into the results.

data.title: Horizon Technology Finance Management hires Danny Hurwitz, expands originations team at Monroe Capital.
data.description: Horizon Technology Finance Management LLC recently announced that it is the manager and investment adviser for Horizon Technology Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: HRZN). The corporation is a prominent specialty finance company that offers capital through secured loans to venture capital, private equity backed, and publicly traded companies in various industries including technology, life science, healthcare information, services, and sustainability. Horizon is affiliated with Monroe Capital.

data.title: Backblaze to report Q2 2025 results on Aug 7, 2025 before market open, hosting a webcast at 5:00 a.m. PT. (Nasdaq: BLZE)
data.description: Backblaze, Inc., a leading cloud storage company (Nasdaq: BLZE), will be announcing its financial results for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025, on Thursday, August 7, 2025, before the market opens. The company will conduct a conference call and webcast at 5:00 a.m. PT (8:00 a.m. ET) on the same day to discuss the results. To participate in the webcast, visit: [webcast link].
